you_ve_been_living_in_my_head_: You've been living in my head for too long. Today I'm writing back.
this_is_your_space_write_whate:
This is your space. Write whatever you need to say — no rules, no
      structure. Just you and the page.
you_don_t_get_to_run_my_life: You don't get to run my life.
writing_this_took_courage_ever:
Writing this took courage. Every word you wrote back to OCD is a step
        toward reclaiming your life. 🌿
every_time_you_wrote_back_to_o: Every time you wrote back to OCD.
no_letters_yet_write_your_firs: No letters yet. Write your first one!
